entry.title: Re: RELEASE STRATEGY PURCHASE REQUISITION
entry.content:
Hi Expert

Thank you very much,

I followed the recommendation, however, in the CL24N you get an inconsistency message, apparently that happens because the feature has no values. So, I added two values in the feature values tab:

Empty - No contract

    *       - With contract

Then in the CL24N for the new feature I checked the value (* No contract) and it worked. Please let me know if the solution I applied is ok or there is another way.

Thanks Percy

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Credit Management Configuration Process
entry.content: Very Useful Information

entry.title: Reusing Story Reports Across Annual Compensation Plan Templates
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I'm looking for guidance on how to efficiently reuse Story Reports for Compensation Planning across yearly review cycles in SAP SuccessFactors.

Each year, we copy the Compensation Planning template for the new compensation cycle (e.g., from "2024 Compensation Review" to "2025 Compensation Review"). We also have a budget overview report, following Learn How to Create A Compensation Budget Dashboard in Report Stories  

The challenge is that Compensation Planning Story Reports are template-specific. There is no option to switch the data source to a new template, and no support for referencing “all templates” or a generic dataset. As a result, we need to manually rebuild the report each year — including recreating queries, tables, and charts — even though the structure is identical.

What we’ve tried:

Saving the Story Report as a template: layout is retained, but queries must be rebuilt from scratch.

Exporting the report: results in package files, and no way to edit

Attempted to edit the query or switch the data source: not possible within current capabilities.

Question: Is there a supported method or workaround to reuse a Story Report across multiple, structurally identical Compensation templates (e.g., annual cycles)? Any insights or approaches would be appreciated, @xavierlegarrec  

Thanks. 

James Vu

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA Job Service needs to be restarted everyday otherwise emails are not sent
entry.content: 👍

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD_2309 - SAP Certified Associate - Back End Dev...
entry.content:
Go through these free learning materials :

Step 1:  https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/setting-up-an-abap-environment-on-sap-btp

1.5 hrs

Step 2: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp

6 Hrs

Step 3: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills

40 Hrs

Step 4: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/practicing-clean-core-extensibility-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud

7 hrs

Step 5. https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-back-end-developer-abap-cloud

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/getting-started-with-abap-cloud-development

Register here For doubt clearing or Queries 1 Hr.

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status value?
entry.content:
ah so, ok, thanks. I was to lazzy to check the customizing, but maybe it is a part of the status customizing, and maybe standard have it just customized this way, if so, you need to customize activities (business transactions) which would switch your statuses. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/configuring-user-status-management/ba-p/13164016

I customized own statuses for HU in EWM, and there we switched it with FM STATUS_CHANGE_FOR_ACTIVITY or something similar.

For HU/Storage bin it is usual case, because with status you can prohibit business transactions (like deletion of the HU, or movement of the stock). And like I said if such logic not required it is easier with EEW 🙂

Re: Unable to Create Mobile Application in SAP Build – "N...
entry.content: What region are you using?  I just created a trial account in us10 and walked through the tutorials step by step and was able to create the mobile app in Build Code as expected.

entry.title: Re: Need another field in "Manage Customer Line Items" or "Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content:
Hi @steffenriemann ,

Thank you so much for your prompt response and for sharing the blog post on the custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app — I really appreciate your support!

While the example you mentioned does seem quite similar to my use case, unfortunately, the suggested approach doesn't fully work for my requirement. Specifically, I’ve tried using the Data Source Extension to include some of the standard fields in the "Manage Supplier Line Items" app, but those fields are currently displaying zero values.

If you have any insights or guidance on how to resolve this issue, it would be a great help. Looking forward to your thoughts!

Best regards,
Sanjay

entry.title: Recruiting Agency Postings
entry.content:
We have requirements from clients where they need Agencies to send more data than what is available in the agency portal:

  1. Can the fields on the submit candidate page in the agency portal be customized?

2. If internal and external job descriptions differ, which job description does the agency posting take? Can Recruiter select which job description to share with which agency?

3. Lastly, does the job have to be posted externally, internally, or both for the job posting to be shared with an agency?

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Credit Management Configuration Process
entry.content: Useful Content!

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Total cal issue
entry.content: Instead of client calculation, is it possible just to use totals through context menu on dimension header in table -> show/hide  -> Totals?

entry.title: Question with the configuration in /sdf/alm_setup
entry.content:
We are trying to configure different CALM use cases for ABAP systems via trsaction /sdf/alm_setup.

In the past we configured signavio and the target alm description shows signavio connection by default.
I can change and configure new Target ALM connection , but my question is , if this impact current Signavio connection by any change ?

Also, I will different use cases like Health Monitoring, Job Monitoring, Change and Deployment etc.
Do I have to configure Target ALM connection for each use cases or one connection is the recommendation from SAP
if the batch user have correct roles assigned for the required use cases?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Question with the configuration in /sdf/alm_setup
entry.content:
1. The existing Signavio Scenario won't be affected by creating a new connection for the SAP Cloud ALM.
    What is more, since ST-PI 740 SP27, the Signavio Process Insight Scenario can be configured within the transaction  /n/SDF/PINS_SETUP, please review the guide:
    https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-insights/administration-guide/connecting-system-directly

  2. It is recommended to use one connection for all the use cases.

entry.title: Re: Firebase Authentication Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi, could you provide bit more information about this issue. Does it happen with preview app or standalone web build or both? You are using 4.12.236 version, right? In addition would be great to understand if this was working earlier in the week since we provided the patch? We haven't done any other updates since the patch early in the week

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 19: BTP Directory and Sub Account naming conventions
entry.content:
This video explains the importance of implementing clear and organized naming conventions for BTP Sub Accounts and Directories. It outlines a system starting with sequence numbers for sorting and identifying accounts, followed by acronyms to define their purpose. The script details naming conventions for directories, sub-accounts, subdomains, and Cloud Foundry spaces, emphasizing how these conventions improve clarity and help avoid confusion in system navigation. By adhering to these conventions, users can easily identify and manage accounts, making their directory structure clean and efficient for better operational efficiency.

 

Takeaways

  • Clear naming conventions are essential for easy identification of BTP Sub Acounts and Directories.
  • Bad naming practices, like using generic names (e.g., 'development'), can cause confusion in distinguishing different systems.
  • A good directory naming convention starts with a sequence number, followed by a descriptive name, and ends with the acronym in brackets.
  • The sequence number in directory names ensures proper sorting and organization of accounts and directories.
  • Sub Account names begin with the directory's sequence number, followed by a unique identifier based on the account's function (e.g., 'sandbox', 'development', 'production').
  • It’s important to use the same sequence number for related Sub Accounts, maintaining consistent organization across systems.
  • Subdomain URLs should omit sequence numbers to avoid clutter but still contain identifiers to link them to the correct directory and sub account.
  • Company acronyms should be added to subdomain names to ensure uniqueness and prevent overlap when using the same naming conventions across multiple clients.
  • For Cloud Foundry spaces, use simple names based on modules or projects, which reduces complexity in naming.
  • The naming conventions ensure that both directories and sub accounts are easily navigable, even in complex or flat lists, and help link super accounts to their corresponding directories.

entry.title: Re: How do I release a material that is in QI without an...
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have tried to replicate your scenario by doing a 561 movement to Q stock.

No inspection lot was created for this material since I did not activate the appropraite inspection type (in this example 05).

The question here is how was you colleague able to indicate that material should be posted to Q stock if no inspection type is active ("selected 'Post to stock' in the material master without identifying the inspection type") since this indicator is defined at inspection type level. Alternatevly you can select stock type while posting.

With movement type 321 you should be able to transfer quantities from Q stock to unrestricted  (or any other stock).

Bets regards, M.

entry.title: Re: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option mi...
entry.content: Hi. Are you doing this from a trial or free tier account? Thanks, Isidro.

entry.title: Can we generate service logic files in TypeScript with the help of Joule in Build Code
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I was exploring SAP Build Code , Can we use TypeScript for Application logic generation. 

By default its creating *.js files 
Thanks,

Satyajit

entry.title: Re: SAP PM - WCM, In the maintenance order level work app...
entry.content:
Greetings,

you need to assign the work permit to the reference object. When a maintenace order is cretae for this reference object the order inherits the permit which triggrs trhe ""WORK APPROVAL" button.

Alternatively you can assign a WCM default control key to the responsible work center in the reference object.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: ArchiveLink connection issue: ERROR => NiBufIConnect:...
entry.content: Hi @Aleksander, did you something on SAP side? Like in SMICM?

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status...
entry.content:
@Jelena_Perfiljeva-  unfortunately there was not mention that custom status would not be add there. 

Now I see hard code -

FYI- that method has the same code which you found in the example. Parameters are action code and Status...see the below example 

Here action_control = Activity = Your Custom Status (ZDOB) 

But standard and custom works differently. 

How standard works ? :

Assume Status Type : DWA in Outbound Delivery

 

SAP Standard DWA1 -> Not Started ( if you F4 on Status Value, you would see 0,1,2,9...etc)

However in custom Status :Example Initial D1T0 - Object value => X ( set because of Initial checkbox) 

"Additionally, I've also looked at the interface /SCDL/IF_AF_STATUS_MANAGEMENT because the name sounded promising. There is no documentation for it in SE24 but it is used in a report /SCWM/POST_PROC_DLV_SET_DOY, so I looked there for an example. The problem with this option is that it has "Activity" as a mandatory parameter and it is not relevant (or even available) in my case." => Again here in custom, Status Type, Status and activity are same. In your case, Activity would be ZDOB. And I think we have set 2 values '- ' or 'X' .

Please let us know if further questions...

PS: accepted that its bit tricky 🙂

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Field processing group not available in work order screen in SAP S/4.
entry.content: Dear Ken, I have the same issue, do you have informations about the pilot note - modification?

entry.title: Re: PO to BTP - IS Migration : Query parameters in HTTP r...
entry.content:
Hi

you can retrieve them via Groovy:
def lv_CamelHttp = lt_headers.get("CamelHttpQuery");

Regards
   Helmut

entry.title: Re: error in SFTP receiver channel in SAP 7.50
entry.content:
This error usually occurs if you have to authenticate using a certificate. This gets more and more common as this is more secure than ordinary basic authentication. Sometimes it's combined (Certificate + Basic)

If you can reach the SFTP from your local PC, try if you can connect via Filezilla (or any other SFTP client)

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Planned receipt of refurbished material appear in MD0...
entry.content:
Greetings,

this might be due to reservation relevance indicator in component details screen. If it is not set to immediately this it will not be seen in MD04 in CRTD status but in (below example) in released status.

Bets regards, M.

entry.title: Re: How to handle generic JSON nodes with XCO?
entry.content: Thanks for the hint, I will give it a try. I am working on a BTP ABAP system and was using the XCO libraries because SAP recommends that for ABAP Cloud, as documented here: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-abap-environment/abap-environment/xco-library. But I will perhaps try use /UI2/CL_JSON instead, seeing as XCO does not seem to support such handling of JSON data.

entry.title: Two managers - same job: How to handle co-leadership in SuccessFactors?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am working in an orgnaization with a lot of part-timers. We get increasingly more Managers who share their roles (e.g. 0.5FTE each). We struggle to find a manageable solution so both can approve workflows for their team or have visibility on the teams employee profiles.

Does anyone have a good idea on how to handle co-leadership in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central  ?

Thanks

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Programs in the LMS
entry.content:
When creating items, it's possible to select wether a learner should be able to self-enroll, if the manager should be able to enroll his/her employees, or if the item could only be assigned by admin.

It seems that with programs it's always possible to self-enroll, and managers can always enroll their employees. Is it possible to turn this off for programs?

Regards,

Merete

entry.title: Re: RELEASE STRATEGY PURCHASE REQUISITION
entry.content: hello, you dont need to put any characteristic values. In the first tab Basic data check Single value. Then you should be able to leave it empty in CL24N. However what you have choose may work as well.

entry.title: (RAP Application) - Using incoming value how to hide the entities (section) dynamically
entry.content:
Hi Developers,  

    My requirement is to conditionally hide sections based on a received value, but unfortunately. The solutions I have found so far are not adequate for my specific needs, and I'm continuing to search for a better solution.   

Help me out to overcome my issue   

Given the situation:
The system should dynamically manage the visibility of the partner entity during sales order creation, such that when the sales order type is one of 'MAKO', 'RTTC', or 'RTTR', the partner entity will be hidden from Application; conversely, for any other sales order type, the partner entity field must be shown to the user.

Found solutions:   

  1. Using Virtual Element in projection view  

         Some of the drawbacks include: 
            The entity (sections) cannot be hidden based on the incoming values. 
            Virtual element implementation will call only read the entity data not for modification face.  

     2. Control Fields with UI.Hidden Annotation  

  • Define Control Fields: Create control fields in your CDS view entity that determine the visibility of entities or sections.  
  • Bind to UI.Hidden: Use the UI.Hidden annotation and bind it to the control fields. This allows you to dynamically control visibility based on the values of these fields.  
  • Set Values Dynamically: Implement determination logic in your behavior definition to set the control field values based on incoming data.  

Some of the drawbacks include: 

  1. Unnecessarily create a field in CDS views. 
  2. Real-time customers won’t accept the dummy fields.  

       To illustrate:   

  1. Within my application, there are 10 sections, and in each section, I encounter difficulty in creating a field within my CDS view entity. Even though I managed to create 10 fields currently and they function as intended, there is a concern that future issues may arise once the application is handed over to the customer.  
  2. Because the customer wants to add another entity (Section) via the RAP Extension and simultaneously conceal a section contingent on a specific field's value, I cannot compel them to introduce an unnecessary placeholder field within their CDS view.   

 

Regards, 

Udhaya

entry.title: Re: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option mi...
entry.content: Sorry. 1-Provide: Microsoft Azure. Region: Singapore. 2-Provide: Amazon Web Services (AWS). Region: US East (VA). Do you see any other subaccounts in the Trial account? Thanks, Isidro.

entry.title: Offboarding not triggering for a new event reason

Hello

Has anyone ever had a case where offboarding does not trigger for a newly created event reason. We have granted the relevant permissions and added the event reason to the offboarding rule. But when we try to terminate an employee with that event reason the employee does not appear on the offboarding dashboard.

Kind Regards
Tumi Mumba

entry.title: Re: Bapi is is not working SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE
entry.content:
What kind of answer do you expect to get, if you do not provide any detailed information about your condition type, your calculation schema, access control, potential user-exits or formulars, your process etc.

Is it possible, that your condition is taken from your referenced document if you create return order via VA01?

During creation via bapi no data is copied from a referenced document, e.g. sales order.

entry.title: Re: Issue in activating Extended CDS View

entry.title: Re: Issue in activating Extended CDS View
entry.content: No NSDM_V_MARC

entry.title: Re: Issue in activating Extended CDS View

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP virtual field leads to out of memory
entry.content: Please make sure to set the virtual field(s) in your event handler in every case (not only conditiuonal) to a value.

entry.title: Re: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option mi...
entry.content: I'm using trial account with US East

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: Supporting service interface operations and others
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

First of all thanks for the pipeline concept, overall it's great and really useful for us.

After updating the pipeline package to version 1.0.10 on our development system however, the Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI stopped working.

Every message we sent to the system directly ended up in the following error: DirectConsumerNotAvailableException: No consumers available on endpoint: direct://Sender.
 
 
All prerequisited were met, we tried deleting/redeploying etc but nothing helped. Eventually we created a case at SAP Support since we thought it might be a problem with our tentant. With their assistance, it turned out that the dynamic process direct receiver ${header.SAP_OutboundProcessingEndpoint} was causing this issue. The scenario we implemented did not follow this path so the header was never set (our scenario is/was quality of service EO with multiple receivers via XSLT). By configuring the partner directory to one receiver the error went away, and the iFlow was working again. After that we reconfigured to multiple receivers and removed the single receiver config. After doing this, the iFlow kept functioning as expected.

Our contact from SAP support however, explained that this error will reappear after every update + redeployment of the iFlow:

Dear Customer,

Everytime the iFlow is redeployed, which is everytime there is a update to the tenant/manually redeployed.

These rules come with the upgraded Apache version.

Hence it is better to maintain this header as a dummy value inside iFlow.

Is this something maybe you can consider doing in one of your future updates of the package? Setting the header with a default value so the error will be prevented? We can ofcourse adjust the standard ourselves, but we prefer to use the standard and benefit from future updates.

Many thanks for your response in advance.

Kind regards,
Arjan Nieuwenhuizen

entry.title: Re: New Installation of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0 – Part 3 – Best Practices Content Activation
entry.content:
Hi @mahesh_sardesai  - Is Best practice content activation applicable for brown field / blue field conversion. Kindly suggest.

Regards

Mukunthan

entry.title: [Webinar] Drive Efficient Testing with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Configuration Webinar Series 2025

We are thrilled to extend a warm welcome to everyone for our SAP Cloud ALM configuration webinar series.

Topic

Drive Efficient Testing with SAP Cloud ALM

With this session, you will

  • Uncover the fundamental value of Test Management in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Discover the core capabilities of Test Management provided by SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Gain valuable insights into the product outlook for Test Management in SAP Cloud ALM.

Agenda

  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview - 5 min
  • Drive Efficient Testing with SAP Cloud ALM - 50 mins
  • Q&A - 5 mins

Register Now

We look forward to seeing you virtually!

Stay updated on upcoming sessions!

For any further queries please contact us on cloudalm@sap.com

 

If you have any questions about the session topic, please feel free to post them in the comments.

entry.title: Event Mesh v.s. Cloud Integration - JMS Adapter
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

My understanding: To achieve asynchronous system integration, Event Mesh is often used. However, according to a blog, asynchronous integration can also be achieved without Event Mesh by using the JMS Adapter within Cloud Integration.

Questions:

  1. Is my understanding correct?
  2. If my understanding is correct, what are the advantages and disadvantages of using Event Mesh versus Cloud Integration - JMS Adapter?
  3. Are there specific use cases for Event Mesh versus Cloud Integration - JMS Adapter? Explanations with examples are appreciated. (when to use event mesh, and when to use JMS Adapter?)
  4. When subscribing Services in BTP Cockpit, Event Mesh must be registered separately from Integration Suite. Does this mean the costs are calculated separately?

Thank you.

entry.title: An error occurred while importing fixed asset posting data
entry.content:
Hi Dear Experts,

When importing fixed asset posting data, the following error occurred. The fiscal year 2025 period for the fixed asset is open, but only ledger 0L is reporting errors, while ledger 2L shows no issues and passes successfully. How can I resolve these errors to import the data properly?

The screenshot below shows the error message:

The attachment is a file used for importing.

 

Please suggest.

Thank you very much.Best Regards!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Data Migration SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: [Webinar] Welcome Session for New SAP Cloud ALM Customers | APAC
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation account to be chaned to normal gl account
entry.content: Use the Transaction code OAMK to change the status of GLs of asset from Recon to non recon or vice versa

entry.title: Re: PO to BTP - IS Migration : Query parameters in HTTP r...
entry.content: In addition to Helmut's answer, I actually did this, I sent a sample request from PO to Cloud Integration and fetched the CamelHttpQuery to find out the query parameters, so this is the outcome: msgguid=17e552df-20d4-11f0-cb21-0000003a8cde&qos=EOIO&queueid=12345&interface=order&senderParty=XYZ&senderService=ABC, so you need to create a receiver http adapter in Cloud Integration and in the Query parameter of the adapter construct a query accordingly, usually for the values you use properties or headers to be able to dynamically define the query, Alex

entry.title: Re: Changing Quota value in a Quota arrangement not apply...
entry.content:
Thanks Caetano,

I did run Edit >  Base Quantities > Collective Calculation from the menu which actually filled in the Quota base quantity for me, I had expected this to balance the quota arrangement so it would only account for active supply in the calculations going forward, but there still appeared to be a substantial time buffer before the planned orders were generated in the ration specified in the QUOTA fields.  Should I just manually add a balance in the field to ensure that with the allocated quantities the ratio of Allocated + Base matches the QUOTA field?  Also do you know what historical data feeds the allocated quantity?  (This is just out of interest rather than helping fix the issue).

Ultimately I am going to suggest to my user base to delete the quota arrangement and create a new one when changing the percentages as I believe asking them to create balance records in the Base Quantity will never be done correctly.

entry.title: Re: PO to BTP - IS Migration : Query parameters in HTTP r...
entry.content: We have e.g. one common IDOC separator in Integration Suite for all sending SAP Backends - in order to get knowledge about the real sender, we are using a query parameter that we add to RFC Destination. This will reduce the number of iflows to be build.

entry.title: Re: BRF+ in SAP MDG: Unable to get BP Central Data fields...
entry.content:
Hello,

What do you have in the Signature tab? If you add BP_CENTRL through "Add Existing Data Object" button, you can reach the fields.

entry.title: Re: Joule is Now Integrated into SAP Build Work Zone!
entry.content: Do I understand you correctly, that I can use Joule in SAP Workzone where various onprem backends are connected. And that Joule can access / interact with these systems, resp. the data? Is there something necessary to implement in the backend system or is it using the standard integration capabilites via cloud connector etc.?

entry.title: Choosing the Right Authorization Method in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm curious to know which authorization methods you prefer when working with the SAP Integration Suite, including OAuth, Basic Authentication, and Client Certificate Authentication. I've noticed that using Client Certificate Authentication can be more complex due to the need to update certificates with all communication partners every 365 days.

Given these considerations, do you have recommendations or best practices to share? Additionally, does SAP provide any guidance on preferred authorization methods for specific scenarios?

Looking forward to hearing your insights!

Thanks!

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Preview/Print of a Document (Crystal Report) not working
entry.content:
Hi Andy,

from everything you mention it seems that the report was not properly imported. You need to open it in Crystal reports, go to "Database => Set Datasource Location" and ensure you have the correct connection setup for your current database. Connection should be set up like "DRIVER={HDBODBC};SERVERNODE=your_server:30015;DATABASE=your_database".

Optional parameters for the connection string are the DB user and DB user password, but I do not recommend using them as those can cause an error if vaules change.

BR,

Matija

entry.title: How to use MDRO.SetRecurrence() function in Cloud Application Studio?
entry.content:
Hello Community.

I have to develop a solution that programmatically triggers mass data run scheduled to run every 5 minutes.

We have found a library AP.PlatinumEngineering where there is function called MDRO.setRecurrence(). However it requires a parameter startdatetime which is of type AP.Common.GDT:Global_DateTime.

We tried using Context.GetCurrentGlobalDateTime() but it returns BASIS:Global_DateTime.

There is no way to cast or use the data type AP.Common.GDT:Global_DateTime in a BO element or in an ABSL script file.

How can we then use the function MDRO.SetRecurrence()?

entry.title: How to chain HANA SQL input files in a HANA SQL Input file
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to simplify my configuration. I have written several sql scripts to create users, roles, policies, set parameters etc. Now I would like to chain these scripts in an input file for hdbsql. 

The best way on my opinion:

loggin on with <sid>adm 

hdbsql -d SYSTEMDB -u SYSTEM

\i configure_hana.script

Content of configure_hana.script:

\i create_roles.sql;

\i create_users.sql;

\i set_parameters.sql;

hdbsql executes the first script, but stucks after this. There are ; at the end of each line in the sql script. 

I do not want to store a user with admin authorisation in hdbuserstore and I do not want to execute hdbsql with password in command line. Because of this, I would like to logon first and then call the input file. 

I can`t find a syntax to terminate the input file. 

Can you give me a hint to the solution.

Best Regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Setup Fund Management in SAP Public Cloud Grow Step b...
entry.content:
Hello @iRzSAP 

Thank you for your follow-up.

Since you're already working within the SAP Public Cloud Grow environment and have access to the starter system, here’s how to proceed using SAP Signavio and SAP Cloud ALM:

 

Where to Find the Process in Signavio:

You can access Fund Management process content via SAP Signavio Process Navigator:

 SAP Signavio Process Navigator

  • Search for: "Fund Management" or "Budget Availability Control"
  • Filter by Line of Business: Finance and Solution Scenario: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Getting Started – Step-by-Step:

  1. Preparation Phase
    • Define your Fund and Commitment Items.
    • Identify budgeting requirements and structure.
  2. Master Data Setup
    • Use the app “Manage Commitment Items”
    • Maintain Fund, Funded Program, Functional Area, and Funds Center.
  3. Configuration (via SSCUIs)
    • Access via Manage Your Solution → Configure Your Solution.
    • SSCUI examples:
      • 104662 – Activate Budget Availability Control
      • 104666 – Assign Commitment Items
  4. Integration & Testing
    • Map FM objects to controlling and FI.
    • Test with purchase requisitions/invoices to simulate budget checks.
    • Monitor via the Budget Availability Control Monitor app.

Let me know if you need further information.

Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: How to turn off the 'Add Comments | Refactor' automatically appearing line in the BAS Editor?
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

I'm using BAS, and whenever i select a variable/line in the code editor, automatically an 'Add Comment | Refactor' option appears above the selection, right in the middle of the code, which pushes the entire code down by a line, which, to be diplomatic, is extremely annoying.

I tried to turn off any AI Assistant related settings but could not figure out, how to get rid of these automatically appearing in line 'helping' features.

Do any of you have any ideas? The feature i'm talking about is this:

Every time you select something, this appear above, which moves the entire code.

Thank You and Best Regards,
Mihaly

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Quartz Theme Issue
entry.content:
There are numerous fixes for Quartz  theme in later patches.

Please test one user with patch 12 and advise if this solves the issue.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Graphical View Filter WHERE IN
entry.content:
Actually I think I am not sure if I understand the question right but you absolutly can do this. When you put a filter operator in a graphical view you can do it

 

[Field to filter]  in ( Select [Field to Filter] from [View] )

Sadly I 've just changed company and I do not have access to Datasphere for the moment  to give you a proper answer but it is totally possible you just have to play with the syntax a little ( I had to use it also)

entry.title: Re: I need to copy functionality to the ASR cockpit
entry.content: -UPDATE- I managed in getting the new value in the table with assigned actions. Next step is to actually make the button work.. I did this by enhancing class /scmtms/cl_ui_tbi_tree, method get_definition. I suspect I might also need to edit the get_data method.

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Authorization Method in SAP Integr...
entry.content:
Hello Stephan,

SAP generally advises:

Use OAuth 2.0 whenever supported by the external system — especially for public APIs or cloud apps.

Use Client Certificates when strong mutual authentication is required and both parties support it, typically in B2B or On-Premise scenarios.

Use Basic Auth only when other options are not possible, and only over HTTPS with frequent password rotation.

Hope this helps!

Thanks,

Punith Oswal

entry.title: Re: Hide columns in Overall Release of Purchase Requisiti...
entry.content:
Hi,

as metadata extensions are not allowed for this particular CDS view, UI adaptations cannot be done in the backend model. Have you tried to use Runtime Adaptation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/UI_ADD-ON_FOR_SAP_NETWEAVER_20/17ae0e97e0fc424a9c368f350c0ba6bd/5c424437bf794f809087fdce391149f2.html

Thank you and best regards

Fabian

entry.title: How can we see the commercial metrics from the instance level?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Based on the demo video - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rKgdj5blylU, we can see the commercial metrics is available for you at an instance level. This is however, not in our case and we cannot see it at instance level. This metric is important for us for cross charging. Due to this, we are not able to get charges under the tags which we have done for Cross charging.

From the recording:

How we see from our tenant:

Screenshot from Cross charging by tags application:

How can we see the commercial metrics from the instance level?

 

Thanks,

Erwin

entry.title: Re: Enabling the Onboarding Journey: Onboarding 2.0 in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello @shrutithakkar ,

We’re currently in the process of implementing ONB 2.0, and I have a question regarding the dynamic groups setup.

While the overall concept is clear, I’m wondering why it's necessary to create yet another user group. In our current configuration, we already maintain both permission groups and recruiting groups. Adding a separate group - particularly for HR Admins - feels redundant and adds to our maintenance burden. It’s also a bit limiting that we can’t assign a role or re-use an existing group in this context.

Another challenge we’re facing is the 200-user cap. Since we have over 200 HR Admins, we’re forced to split them into two groups, which increases complexity and manual upkeep.

Are there any options to re-use existing permission groups, plans to increase the group size limit, or perhaps recommended best practices to manage this more efficiently?

Thanks in advance for your support!

Kind regards,
Roos🌹

entry.title: Deploying Fiori application on S4 side on premise edition from BAS
entry.content:
Dear Specs ! 

I 've an S4 System with Embedded BW in it. I've been asked to create a fiori application that can launch process chain from the fiori . 

I 've never been built this kind of application before so I've started some search and I've got a little confusion. 

Can somehow Fiori application been deployed S4 side so I can call Function modules directly or only Odata calls are working ?

Could you give me some guidance on how to make the first steps ?  Calling directly the function modules, deploying the app directly upon S4 on premise system ? 

Sorry I mainly see solutions that covers scenario for cloud but for me this is not the case I would like to use Fiori as I would use a dynpro program calling FM-s directly not calling HTTP requests if it is possible.

quite difficult to judge the root cause with the information given below. I recommend you to open an incident for this issue.

Fabian

entry.content:
Hello together,

I'm struggling with GR Production in Embedded EWM in the Process Advanced Production Integration.

If I open the Transaction /SCWM/GRPI and put in the Search Area my Manufactoring order I can't find my Manufacturing Order, there is no document available.

 

 

I have checked the Customizing, but seems to be ok for me

Can anyone explain me why? Thanks for you support!

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Learning H1 2025 Release: Key Highlights and Features
entry.content: Thank you Arko

entry.title: Re: Michal's tips: Application Interface Framework (AIF) 2.0 - monitoring existing IDOCs
entry.content:
Hi @MichalKrawczyk ,

Thanks for bringing up this, helped me in my AIF configuration as a beginner

I have a requirement where I need to create a inbound IDOC and trigger it in the system. Then I need to do post goods movement 101 in custom function module which is part of AIF Configuration. While sending IDOC using "IDOC_WRITE_AND_START_INBOUND" the material document no is also getting created. Now what can I do in AIF related custom FM.

PLease suggest me the correct way of doing this.

entry.title: Could not find service binding of type 'destination'.
entry.content:
I am a beginner in CAP and using destination, but I keep encountering errors. I have already configured the destination in Cockpit, and the connectivity test works fine. However, when I try to connect using code, I keep getting the following error. Could you please tell me what step is missing in this binding?

error message:
[2025-04-24T06:24:19.328Z] WARN (environment-accessor): Could not find service binding of type 'destination'. This might cause errors in other parts of the application.
[cds] - Error: Could not find service binding of type 'destination'.
at resolveServiceBinding (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity/dist/scp-cf/environment-accessor/service-bindings.js:86:19)
at serviceToken (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity/dist/scp-cf/token-accessor.js:27:77)
at getProviderServiceToken (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity/dist/scp-cf/destination/get-provider-token.js:12:61)
at Object.getAllDestinationsFromDestinationService (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity/dist/scp-cf/destination/destination-accessor.js:99:65)
at async ProcessorService.getInternalData (/home/user/projects/incident-management/srv/services.js:113:17)
at async next (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:64:17)
at async ProcessorService.handle (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:62:10)
at async ProcessorService.handle (/home/user/projects/incident-management/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/common/Service.js:81:16)
[error] - 500 > {
code: '500',
message: "Could not find service binding of type 'destination'."
}
 
code :
 
const destination = await connect.getDestination('test')
console.log("destination", destination);
const res1 = await httpClient.executeHttpRequest(destination);
console.log("after result", res1);
 
or using the mock destinations, still the same error message:
 
const reg = await connect.registerDestination({name: 'test', url: 'https://google.com'});
console.log(reg);
console.log('--------------------');
const all = await connect.getAllDestinationsFromDestinationService();
console.log(all);

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content: Now the service request has worked (bevor it was just cancelled). Our Public Demo System has Joule  for ABAP Developer activated.

entry.content: Hi everyone, I’m working on a cross‑platform mobile project and need guidance on SAP mobile app development. What’s the best way to structure my app using SAP BTP SDK versus the Mobile Development Kit (MDK)? Which approach offers the most flexibility and ease for enterprise‑grade app development?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create hierarchy variables in Datas...
entry.content:
Thank you Michael.
But do you maybe know any possibility to show this hiearchy in the prompt that comes up when the dashboard opens up?

entry.title: Publish SAP DM data to MQTT Broker using trigger(Manage Subscription app)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Use Case: MQTT is sending data to SAP DM and after processing the data SAP DM need to send (publish) the response(Acknowledgement) back to MQTT. 

Issue: as we understood is that if we select message publishing option in trigger(Manage Subscription) Action tab, then DM won't allow you to call the PPD and send the output. so as per understanding we can only send constant value to MQTT. 

Help Portal Link - Create a Subscription | SAP Help Portal

Ask: we need to send data to MQTT Topic from DM

can anyone please help us that how we can overcome this challenge to publish data to the MQTT topic from SAP DM.

Quick response will be appreciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: calling SAPF124 to z program
entry.content:
or pass directly the values to SAPF124 without using LT_SELSCREEN:

submit SAPF124  WITH x_shblf = 'X'
                WITH BUKRX = p_comp   " Company Code ('BFL')
                WITH GJAHX = p_gjahr  " Year ('2011')
                exporting list to memory
                and return.
*submit SAPF124  WITH SELECTION-TABLE lt_selscreen with x_shblf = 'X'

entry.title: What is going to replace req._query/req._queryOptions
entry.content:
Hi,

Since CDS version 8, req._query is not available anymore and is replaced by req._queryOptions. But, in the logs, it is mentioning that req._queryOptions is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. What else is going to be available to retrieve plain text OData parameters ?

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Authorization Method in SAP Integr...
entry.content:
Thank you for the quick response. I have three questions regarding this:

1. If I create a service key for OAuth authentication, can I use the ClientID and Client Secret for Basic Authentication as well? Can I disable this option?

2. Do I always need to share the .pem and .key files with external partners when using Client Certificate?

3. When connecting SOAP services via SOAMANAGER to the Integration Suite, do I only have the option to authenticate using Basic Authentication and Client Certificate? Is OAuth not supported here?

entry.title: Re: APIs for creating ticket and getting ticket details
entry.content: Can you tell me the process of doing this?

entry.title: Optional Sandbox system starter price
entry.content:
Hello, we use SAP S4H Public cloud edition 3SL. We are already in the Production tenant and the starter system was decommissioned after 30 days. We however need the starter environment again. 

I found that there is an option to subscribe to the optional Sandbox system for a fee. Could you please guide me on how to do it? And where can I find the fee amount? 

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Could not find service binding of type 'destination'.
entry.content:
Hi,

This usually means your application is not correctly bound to the Destination service on BTP.  Please ensurepackage.json has an entry for the destination "test" in the following under cds.requires

"cds": {
  "requires": {
    "test-destination": {
      "kind": "rest",
      "credentials": {
        "destination": "test"
      }
    }
  }
}

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Learning Strategies for Complex Groovy Scripts and Gr...
entry.content: Thank you for the response. But it's possible to recreate the functions from the B2B Add-On for graphical mapping, right? I believe that in the EDI area, most mapping requirements can be covered this way, can't they?

entry.title: Re: How and where to see people bio and contact details in Community 2024?
entry.content: Please add a feedback if you can't see the bio or contact details of other people, or add a feeback if you can, thank you 😉

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @nandini1601 ,

as of now SAP will do the configuration via note 3590400. This note is only about the configuration, which will soon also be automated. The operation of the BW DPG itself will be customer (BW Expert) driven.

Best Regards

Christof

entry.title: Re: Compensation - Promotion columns are not populate in worksheet after 1H 2025 Release
entry.content: Hi @EfratAssaraf, If the mapping for the promotions columns are all correct (https://dam.sap.com/mac/u/a/2zNkyVE?rc=10&doi=SAP949258) and this is something which was working previously, then I would recommend logging a support ticket to review. Thanks, Andres

entry.title: Re: Learning Strategies for Complex Groovy Scripts and Gr...
entry.content: Thank you for the links. Do you know if there are any courses focused on learning graphical mapping, Groovy Script, and XSLT?

entry.title: Re: Story Report for Goal Management - how many employees...
entry.content:
Emp with one Goal

IF(ISNULL([Goal Management#Primary Goal Fields#Goal ID]) ,0 ,1 )

 

GOAL Status

IF(ISNULL([Goal Management#Primary Goal Fields#Goal ID]), 0, 1 )

entry.title: Re: Configurable New Hire in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Good Day Andrew,

I know a lot has changed since this article was first posted. We are now at the point where we can customise the RNHD and PDC templates/screens. Including standard and custom MDFs. 

However, it seems when rehiring with old/new employment, any custom MDFs are not available during the RNHD step. It also seems SAP is not planning on introducing this any time soon. Our client does not wish to make use of the ADC step as this cannot be maintained in EC so that is not an option or a solution to this current situation. 

Do you have any suggestions or alternative workarounds for how we can get a custom MDF object/portlet which has been added to the People Profile to display during rehire scenarios as this MDF is crucial to the client's business.

Many thanks and hope to hear from you soon. 

Caitlin

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Graphical View Filter WHERE IN
entry.content:
Oh nice, indeed it works like that:
ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ID FROM TABLE)

entry.title: Re: What's the best practice to update story reports to n...
entry.content: yes we also use this and it help to change the template and also some filter in section.

entry.title: Re: Joule with SFSF – Common Setup Issues
entry.content:
One to add to the list: SF sales demo systems do not allow changing IAS tenant. As a result, you need to align with the system admin of your S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition TDD if you plan on using it across SF and S/4. The only option is to change the IAS tenant used by S/4, or to purchase an additional Joule TDD tenant with the limitation of not being able to demo cross-product functionality.

KBA 2944990: “This upgrade process does not work for Sales Demos at present. Paid Sales Demos are created with pre-integrated IAS & IPS”.

entry.title: How to know if the element is an OData entity
entry.content:
Dear community,

Is there any way to confirm if the field is accessible with the OData APIs and, if it is, which OData API service to use to access it?

For example, how do you know whether this field "Goods Issue Date" is available for some OData API service?

Also, how do you find an accessible API to the field?

I would appereciate any small information on this!

Thanks&Regards,

entry.title: Re: My blog does not get posted since 3 weeks
entry.content: Hi Anne, I think you found the reason. SAP Community Groups Interest Groups Welcome Corner Blog Posts Dashboard Through the Looking Glass: Manage Service Orders in Joule

entry.title: Re: My blog does not get posted since 3 weeks
entry.content: Are you able to move it to the service management area?
